summary: Project Value & Quotation History system fully tested. All backend APIs (22 tests) passed. Frontend UI components verified: QuotationHistorySection displays table with version, value, date, prepared by, status columns; ValueLifecycleCard shows inquiry/booked/contract values with lock status, discount info, and action buttons. Lock Contract button visible only at Design Finalization stage when not locked. Override Lock and Apply Discount buttons visible only for Admin role when contract is locked.

issues: Inquiry Value and Booked Value show ₹0 for test project - may need to be populated from lead conversion

passed_tests: Backend: Auth verification - Admin session valid
Backend: Lead quotation history - GET returns quotation_history array
Backend: Lead quotation history - POST adds Tentative entry
Backend: Lead quotation history - POST adds Revised entry
Backend: Lead quotation history - Approved status supersedes previous entries
Backend: Lead quotation history - Invalid status rejected with 400
Backend: Project quotation history - GET returns quotation_history array
Backend: Project quotation history - POST adds entry
Backend: Value lifecycle - GET returns all value fields
Backend: Project has value fields in response
Backend: Lock already locked contract returns 400
Backend: Lock contract on unlocked project succeeds
Backend: Override contract value (Admin) succeeds
Backend: Apply discount (Admin) succeeds
Backend: Discount exceeding contract rejected
Backend: Negative discount rejected
Backend: Designer cannot override contract (403)
Backend: Designer cannot apply discount (403)
Backend: Quotation history persisted correctly
Backend: Discount persisted correctly
Frontend: Lead Quotation History table displays with correct columns
Frontend: Lead Quotation History - Add Quote button opens modal
Frontend: Lead Quotation History - Modal has value, status, note fields
Frontend: Lead Quotation History - Status badges colored correctly (Approved=green, Superseded=red+strikethrough)
Frontend: Project Value Lifecycle Card displays inquiry/booked/contract values
Frontend: Project Value Lifecycle Card shows Contract Locked badge when locked
Frontend: Project Value Lifecycle Card shows discount amount and reason
Frontend: Project Value Lifecycle Card shows Final Value after discount
Frontend: Lock Contract button visible at Design Finalization (unlocked)
Frontend: Lock Contract button NOT visible when already locked
Frontend: Override Lock button visible for Admin when locked
Frontend: Apply Discount button visible for Admin
Frontend: Override Lock modal has value input, reason textarea, audit warning
Frontend: Apply Discount modal has amount input, reason textarea
Frontend: Lock Contract modal shows value and irreversibility warning
Frontend: Project Quotation History table displays with correct columns
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: QuotationHistoryEntry model correctly defines quoted_value, status, note fields
VERIFIED: Approved status correctly supersedes all previous entries
VERIFIED: Lock contract value creates audit comment in project comments
VERIFIED: Override contract value requires Admin/Founder role and mandatory reason
VERIFIED: Apply discount requires Admin/Founder role and validates amount <= contract_value
VERIFIED: All value lifecycle operations create system comments for audit trail
VERIFIED: Frontend components use correct data-testid attributes for testing
seed_data_creation: Used existing test data: lead_796ab5db has 6 quotation entries, proj_0a79eb51 has contract locked with discount applied
context_for_next_testing_agent: Project Value & Quotation History feature fully implemented and tested. Key test IDs: lead_796ab5db (quotation history), proj_0a79eb51 (locked contract with discount), proj_75cbbddb (unlocked at Design Finalization). All APIs working: POST /api/leads/{id}/quotation-history, POST /api/projects/{id}/quotation-history, POST /api/projects/{id}/lock-contract-value, POST /api/projects/{id}/override-contract-value, POST /api/projects/{id}/apply-discount, GET /api/projects/{id}/value-lifecycle

feature_verification_summary.lead_quotation_history: WORKING - Table displays version, value, date, prepared by, status. Add Quote modal works. Approved status supersedes previous.
feature_verification_summary.project_quotation_history: WORKING - Same functionality as lead quotation history
feature_verification_summary.value_lifecycle_card: WORKING - Shows inquiry/booked/contract values, locked status, discount info, final value
feature_verification_summary.lock_contract_value: WORKING - Button visible at Design Finalization when not locked. Creates audit comment.
feature_verification_summary.override_contract_value: WORKING - Admin only. Requires mandatory reason. Creates audit comment.
feature_verification_summary.apply_discount: WORKING - Admin only. Tracks amount, reason, approver. Shows final value.
